build.buildCommand: cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && npm install

deploy.startCommand: REPO=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/dyegofarias86-create/limpar-auto/main && for f in backend/server.js backend/routes/upload.js backend/routes/billing.js backend/routes/dashboard.js backend/routes/clients.js backend/routes/marketing.js backend/routes/provisions.js; do curl -sf $REPO/$f -o $f && echo "refreshed $f"; done && cd backend && node server.js
